checks.name: authenticated_pr_assurance_mutations_are_rejected
checks.run:
import subprocess,sys
result=subprocess.run([sys.executable,'-m','pytest','-q','tests/test_pr_assurance.py'],capture_output=True,text=True,timeout=120,check=False); assert result.returncode==0,result.stdout+result.stderr; assert ' passed' in result.stdout
print('PR_ASSURANCE_MUTATIONS_REJECTED')

checks.name: authority_boundary_is_offline
checks.run:
from pathlib import Path
text=Path('factoryline/pr_assurance.py').read_text(encoding='utf-8'); forbidden=['requests','httpx','urllib','socket','subprocess','os.system']; assert not any(value in text for value in forbidden); assert 'github_check_request' in text; assert '.post(' not in text and '.request(' not in text
